name: Ryan Hambleton
title: Visualization Developer & Analytics Engineer
summary: I build BI platforms, data pipelines, and AI-assisted workflows — from Tableau dashboards to agent prototypes. Platform-agnostic, outcome-focused.

highlights: Led executive KPI dashboard program with governed metrics and row-level security
Built Alteryx and SQL pipelines for multi-source inventory analytics
Prototyped agent-assisted workflows for operational routing scenarios (clean-room demos)
Mentored analysts on self-service patterns and documentation standards
Delivered Tableau solutions across retail, healthcare, and finance clients
Automated recurring reports with Alteryx, reducing manual effort by 50%+
Translated ambiguous business questions into measurable dashboard requirements
